scope.name: Project PHP, HTML, and CSS files
scope.pattern: file[SMRC - Auth]:config//*.php||file[SMRC - Auth]:config//*.phtml||file[SMRC - Auth]:config//*.html||file[SMRC - Auth]:src//*.php||file[SMRC - Auth]:src//*.phtml||file[SMRC - Auth]:src//*.html||file[SMRC - Auth]:public//*.php||file[SMRC - Auth]:public//*.phtml||file[SMRC - Auth]:public//*.html
